mapper.insert: INSERT INTO quest_logs (quest_id, user_id, verify_type, photo_url, elapsed_sec, base_xp, earned_xp, streak_days) VALUES (#{questId}, #{userId}, #{verifyType}, #{photoUrl}, #{elapsedSec}, #{baseXp}, #{earnedXp}, #{streakDays})
mapper.select: SELECT log_id, quest_id, user_id, verify_type, photo_url, elapsed_sec, base_xp, earned_xp, streak_days, completed_at FROM quest_logs WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY completed_at DESC

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ( SELECT CAST(DATEDIFF(CURDATE(), DATE(MIN(completed_at))) AS SIGNED) AS diff, CAST(ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY DATE(MIN(completed_at)) DESC) AS SIGNED) AS rn FROM quest_logs WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND quest_id = #{questId} AND DATE(completed_at) <= CURDATE() GROUP BY DATE(completed_at) ) s WHERE diff - rn = -1 OR diff = 0

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ( SELECT CAST(DATEDIFF(CURDATE(), DATE(MIN(ql.completed_at))) AS SIGNED) AS diff, CAST(ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY DATE(MIN(ql.completed_at)) DESC) AS SIGNED) AS rn FROM quest_logs ql JOIN quests q ON ql.quest_id = q.quest_id WHERE ql.user_id = #{userId} AND q.stat_type = #{statType} AND DATE(ql.completed_at) <= CURDATE() GROUP BY DATE(ql.completed_at) ) s WHERE diff - rn = -1 OR diff = 0

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ( SELECT CAST(DATEDIFF(CURDATE(), DATE(MIN(ql.completed_at))) AS SIGNED) AS diff, CAST(ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY DATE(MIN(ql.completed_at)) DESC) AS SIGNED) AS rn FROM quest_logs ql JOIN quests q ON ql.quest_id = q.quest_id WHERE ql.user_id = #{userId} AND q.stat_type = #{statType} AND q.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{titleKeyword}, '%') AND DATE(ql.completed_at) <= CURDATE() GROUP BY DATE(ql.completed_at) ) s WHERE diff - rn = -1 OR diff = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) > 0 FROM quest_logs ql JOIN quests q ON ql.quest_id = q.quest_id WHERE ql.user_id = #{userId} AND q.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{titleKeyword}, '%') AND DATE(ql.completed_at) = CURDATE()

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ( SELECT CAST(DATEDIFF(CURDATE(), DATE(MIN(ql.completed_at))) AS SIGNED) AS diff, CAST(ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY DATE(MIN(ql.completed_at)) DESC) AS SIGNED) AS rn FROM quest_logs ql JOIN quests q ON ql.quest_id = q.quest_id WHERE ql.user_id = #{userId} AND q.period = 'DAILY' AND DATE(ql.completed_at) <= CURDATE() GROUP BY DATE(ql.completed_at) ) s WHERE diff - rn = -1 OR diff = 0

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ( SELECT CAST(DATEDIFF(CURDATE(), DATE(MIN(ql.completed_at))) AS SIGNED) AS diff, CAST(ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY DATE(MIN(ql.completed_at)) DESC) AS SIGNED) AS rn FROM quest_logs ql JOIN quests q ON ql.quest_id = q.quest_id WHERE ql.user_id = #{userId} AND q.period = 'DAILY' AND DATE(ql.completed_at) <= CURDATE() GROUP BY DATE(ql.completed_at) ) s WHERE diff - rn = -1 OR diff = 0

SELECT IF( EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM quests WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{titleKeyword}, '%') AND is_active = 1), DATEDIFF(CURDATE(), COALESCE(MAX(DATE(ql.completed_at)), '2000-01-01')), 0 ) FROM quest_logs ql JOIN quests q ON ql.quest_id = q.quest_id WHERE ql.user_id = #{userId} AND q.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{titleKeyword}, '%')

SELECT ql.log_id AS logId, ql.quest_id AS questId, ql.user_id AS userId, q.title AS title, q.period AS period, ql.verify_type AS verifyType, ql.photo_url AS photoUrl, ql.elapsed_sec AS elapsedSec, ql.earned_xp AS earnedXp, ql.streak_days AS streakDays, ql.completed_at AS completedAt FROM quest_logs ql LEFT JOIN quests q ON ql.quest_id = q.quest_id WHERE ql.user_id = #{userId} AND ql.completed_at >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 7 DAY) ORDER BY ql.completed_at DESC
